name: Razor Stance
description: For 10 seconds: every time you hit an enemy, apply 1[bleed]([dex]). Vengeance — for 4 more seconds, that bleed becomes 2.

name: Tremor Lock
description: If enemy is [stun]: deal 5([int]). Then apply 1[stun]([int]) and 4[slow]([int]).

name: Sidestep & Slash
description: Deal 5([dex]). Apply 2[bleed]. Gain 1[stam]. Vengeance: deal 3 more.

name: Flame Dart
description: Deal 5([dex]) to a random enemy. Apply 2[burn].

name: Kindle Strike
description: Deal 7([str]). Apply 3[burn]([int]). For 5 seconds: every [burn] applied to enemy gains +1.
